meaning: adj.地中长出的,人类的,会死的,尘世的
examples: I shall be immortal in the earthborn form!
But not alone for his earthborn children was this revelation given.
Also the dragon (serpent), earthborn, in craftiness coming behind thee.
Messiaen adds slithery harmonics to end phrases, as if a silken thread of light carries the song that connects the earthborn boulders and birds to a celestial afterworld.
